category_sources: Official homepage https://prometheus.io/ presents Prometheus as monitoring and alerting software.
source_facts.description says it is a service monitoring system and time series database.
display_name_sources: Official homepage https://prometheus.io/ uses the project name Prometheus.
docs_sources: Official Prometheus site exposes dedicated documentation at https://prometheus.io/docs/.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already has https://github.com/prometheus/prometheus, so repo is returned as null per instruction.
tags_sources: Official docs at https://prometheus.io/docs/ cover monitoring, metrics, alerting, and querying.
source_facts.description identifies service monitoring and a time series database.
source_facts.executables includes prometheus and promtool CLI tools.
